" ^ . ] 3TK. • # . fa^Tl, y^«W " * # R MINISTRY OF INFORMATION AND BROAD- CASTING NOTD7ICATION New Delhi, the 13th September. 2000 G.S.R. 719(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) and sub-section (2) of section 22 of the Cable Television Networks (Regulation) Act. 1995 (7 of 1995). the Central Government hereby rescinds the notification of the Ministry of Information and Broadcasting bearing G.S.R. 597(E) dated 20th August, 1999 with immediate efFect.
